name: North Towns
description_short: Northtown Automotive is a multi-location car dealership in Buffalo, NY offering new and used vehicle sales, financing, service, and parts — not a financial services or lending company.
description_long: Northtown Automotive operates as a traditional automobile dealership network across the Buffalo, New York region, with multiple locations and specialized departments. The company functions primarily as a vehicle retailer and service provider, offering comprehensive automotive solutions rather than consumer financial products or lending services. Their core operations include sales of new and pre-owned vehicles from major manufacturers, vehicle financing through traditional dealer channels, collision repair, tire sales, parts ordering, and vehicle maintenance services. The dealership emphasizes value-added services such as Kelley Blue Book integration, vehicle trade-in programs, XPEL paint protection, and an exclusive "Platinum Plus" rewards program for customers. Northtown distinguishes itself through community involvement—serving as the official dealer of the Buffalo Bills and Buffalo Sabres—and through SNAP online shopping delivery, extended warranties via "Engine Shield," and a diverse inventory of electric vehicles alongside traditional models. The dealership also operates a detail center and has established a SUNY Erie Automotive Operating Systems partnership program. However, Northtown is fundamentally a retail automotive business, not a consumer finance company. Its financing operations are typical dealer financing—arranging loans through third-party lenders for vehicle purchases—which is standard automotive retail practice, not alternative lending or financial services provision. The company does not offer payday alternatives, personal loans, emergency cash, debt relief, credit building, or any non-automotive financial products.
services: Pre-owned and certified used vehicle sales
pros: Multi-location network across Buffalo area with multiple service departments
Online shopping and SNAP delivery option for vehicle purchases
Diverse inventory including new models, used vehicles, certified pre-owned, and electric vehicles
Comprehensive service offerings: collision repair, detailing, tire center, parts department
Extended warranty program (Engine Shield) available on new and pre-owned vehicles
Community partnerships with Buffalo Bills and Buffalo Sabres
Educational resources including KBB trade-in advisor and fuel economy guides
cons: Not a financial services provider — offers only standard dealer financing, not alternative lending products
Miscategorized on CreditDoc as 'payday-alternatives' despite having no lending operations
No consumer finance products, credit-building tools, or alternative lending services available
Typical automotive dealership markup and financing terms apply; not a specialized financial institution
Limited utility for consumers seeking actual financial products or lending alternatives
best_for: Consumers in Buffalo, NY seeking to purchase or service vehicles
Customers looking for new or used vehicle inventory from major manufacturers
Vehicle owners needing collision repair, maintenance, or parts services
diagnosis: Northtown Automotive is fundamentally a retail car dealership, not a consumer finance or lending company. Its inclusion in the 'payday-alternatives' category is a categorical error—it provides vehicle sales and service, with standard dealer financing arrangements, but does not offer alternative lending products, emergency loans, credit-building services, or any non-automotive financial solutions. Consumers seeking actual financial products should not rely on this company.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
